calendar.matters:
Petition To Invalidate The Second Amendment For Undue Influence; For Elder Abuse; Petition For Removal Of Trustee; For Appointment Of Successor Truste
Off Calendar Oct-04-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Oct-04-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kristen Tabone, via Zoom, for Juliet Mendoza, Grace Ogden, and Jessica Jajeh, Petitioners; Mia Polo, via Zoom, for Maria Mande, Trustee.

The court confirms that there are no appearances to object and confirms with counsel that there are no known objections. The court confirms with counsel that the court will be taking the underlying petition set for Oct-18-2022 off calendar if this petition is granted.

The Petition or Approval of Settlement is granted, and the order is signed in open court. The Petition to Invalidate the Second Amendment, etc., set for Oct-18-2022, is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. William Barry. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
